examples: Mubai: Rough and 5 calloused. The hand of a Shuang Dao master.
His hands were rough and calloused, from years of karate practice.
A fellow rower might notice that his right palm is more calloused than the left.
Immigrants helped lay the railroads and build our cities, calloused hand by calloused hand.
Naomi Darg would spend her days doling out lotion to the women of the village to soothe their calloused hands.
